examples: Another name for Shrove Tuesday is Pancake day.
At Olney, a small town in England, Shrove Tuesday is Pancake Race Day.
Pancake Day, or Shrove Tuesday to the traditionalists, is a last hurrah before the austerity of a pancake-free Lent.
If players score a goal before 5 pm on Shrove Tuesday, the first ball is retired and a new ball is put into play.
